title: Consolidated Advisory Rollout Report — Final Decision

scope_rationale.failed: Run failed — recovery guidance most relevant
scope_rationale.passed+partial: NOT included by default — anomaly case, conservative

final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed. 8/8 invariants verified. 30/30 cycles validated with 0 violations. Scope is conservative (failed+blocked only, default OFF). Advisory output is additive, non-blocking, and immediately rollback-able. Decision: candidate_for_broader_advisory_rollout. This does NOT activate rollout. Activation requires explicit operator approval, integration into reporting pipeline, and validation on diverse run outcomes (including blocked status).
summary: EPIC #892 complete. 8 invariants verified. 30 cycles validated. auto_executable_violations=0. loop_decision_violations=0. Final decision: candidate_for_broader_advisory_rollout. No auto-execution. No mandatory gate. Default off.

findings.finding: Advisory scope is conservative: failed+blocked only, default OFF

findings.evidence: INV-1 to INV-8 all passed: default_off, rollback, no_auto_exec, loop_unchanged, is_gate=False, fields_preserved, scope_filter, advisory_only.

findings.finding: 30/30 shadow cycles validated with 0 auto_exec and loop_decision violations
Only 1 run_status (failed) exercised on real data — blocked not in shadow set
findings.evidence: All 30 shadow cycles are failed+partial. blocked status not represented in real data.

findings.finding: Rollback verified: disabling flag removes all advisory output immediately
findings.evidence: INV-3: rollback removes recovery_recommendation and bridge_diagnostics from all reports

recommendations.recommendation: Surface recovery_recommendation in execution reports via ADVISORY_ROLLOUT_ENABLED=true (opt-in)
recommendations.rationale: Safe, advisory-only, reversible. Adds recovery context to failed/blocked run reports.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT auto-execute any recovery recommendation
recommendations.rationale: Recommendations are advisory. Execution must always require explicit human/operator action.

recommendations.recommendation: Validate advisory on blocked runs before wider rollout
recommendations.rationale: All 30 shadow cycles are failed+partial. blocked status not exercised on real data.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT enable advisory by default before diverse run data validation
recommendations.rationale: Only 1/9 recovery templates exercised on real data. Broader validation needed.
